creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=95113c500f0729b483f03f2984f709700c934b39

commit 95113c500f0729b483f03f2984f709700c934b39
Author:     Trenton Schulz <trueos@norwegianrockcat.com>
AuthorDate: 2023-08-14 11:40:15 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-08-15 11:45:12 +0000

    x11-fonts/juliamono: update to 0.050

    https://github.com/cormullion/juliamono/blob/v0.050/CHANGELOG.md

    Added

     * stylistic set ss16 - smaller parentheses, brackets, and braces
     * alternate ASCII tilde in cv03
     * mastodon logo 0xF0AD1 󰫑
     * prohibited sign 0x1f6c7 🛇
     * 0x0b83 ஃ, 0xA95f ꥟, 0x115C9 𑗉

    Changed

     * diacritics positioning reworked
     * family linking tweaked, hopefully fixing #172
     * æ œ
     * inverse shapes ◘◙◚◛
     * fixed hexagram errors
     * Cyrillic Yery with back Yer
     * Greek glyphs 0x1F0D, 0x1F1D, 0x1F2D, 0x1F6D adjusted
     * roman numerals Ⅰ Ⅱ Ⅲ redone
     * github workflow tweaked
     * Braille 235678 ⣶ 0x28f6 was too high, moved down

    PR:             273082
    Reported by:    trueos@norwegianrockcat.com (maintainer)

 x11-fonts/juliamono/Makefile | 4 ++--
 x11-fonts/juliamono/distinfo | 6 +++---
 2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
